chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 666 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of pre-arrest bail 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of pre-arrest bail 06.10.2025 Complainant is present in person. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicant is present on interim pre-arrest bail. Syed Baqir Raza Musavi, Advocate files vakalatnama along with statement and other documents on behalf of the applicant. Learned Counsel along with the party appearing in the matter states that the parties have withdrawn the civil proceeding as it is settled between them that the total liability of Rs.21,00,000/- (Rupees twenty one lac) shall be paid within a period of six months, and as such, the complainant present extends his no objection to the grant of bail. Learned Additional PG present, on account of compoundable nature of the offence, does not oppose the same. Accordingly, order dated 06.08.2025, whereby the applicant was granted interim pre-arrest bail, stands confirmed on the same terms and conditions. The bail application stands allowed on account of the fore given. J U D G E Abdul Basit
